vectaraHHEM.note: Adapter mean across ≥3 seeds must be ≤ ceiling; baseline recorded before training

hiddenPackCalibration.note: sophia-full vs raw on third-party or reviewer-controlled pack

mmluPro.note: Adapter must not regress >2.0 points vs base on MMLU-Pro (honest abstention tradeoff)

internalReleaseGate.require: promote on ≥1 seed without protected-suite regression

successRules: All evidence-oracle thresholds met with ≥3 seeds / CI excluding 0 where applicable
failureRules: Any protected-suite regression (religion/history) on promote_adapter → reject adapter
Holdout seal mismatch or train/eval contamination → abort and ledger
Evidence oracle blocked (no API keys) → record blocker; do not cite training-oracle as substitute
MMLU-Pro regression >2.0 points → headline claim withdrawn even if internal gate passes
claimBoundary: Behavioral discipline + verifier-gated habits on Qwen2.5-7B — NOT AGI, NOT zero hallucination
